## Source: amazon-inspector (0a29cf25347b160fe6625e86e0df46723174e739cebc771b5d08eab295a68aae)
The package bytefrontier-sdk was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (e326705265f568d365ce34020b91d6ea6c3b870bf26a0ba96ca4bff8cc6a8856)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'bytefrontier-sdk' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
